Personal Projects

The many ways I fill my time

Scales Trainer

This is a little something I threw together in late 2025 to help me improve at guitar!

Distilled Harmony

I sang for three years in one of Boston's best a capella groups, competing and collaborating with colleges across the Northeast and making friends for life. Check us out here.

Replicator Dynamics

In 2023, I created a program to simulate discrete-time replicator dynamics in Python based on outdated C++ and Java code with my favorite professor, Rory Smead.
